description: Query and administer MongoDB databases and Atlas resources via MCP.
name: io.qent.broxy/mongodb

environmentVariables.description: MongoDB connection string for direct database connections (optional, if not set, you'll need to call the connect tool before interacting with MongoDB data)
environmentVariables.name: MDB_MCP_CONNECTION_STRING

environmentVariables.description: Atlas API client ID for authentication (required for running Atlas tools)
environmentVariables.name: MDB_MCP_API_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Atlas API client secret for authentication (required for running Atlas tools)
environmentVariables.name: MDB_MCP_API_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: Atlas API base URL (default is https://cloud.mongodb.com/)
environmentVariables.name: MDB_MCP_API_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: MongoDB server address for direct connections (optional, used for connect tool)
environmentVariables.name: MDB_MCP_SERVER_ADDRESS

environmentVariables.description: MongoDB server port for direct connections (optional, used for connect tool)
environmentVariables.name: MDB_MCP_SERVER_PORT

environmentVariables.description: Folder to store logs (inside the container)
environmentVariables.name: MDB_MCP_LOG_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of tool names, operation types, and/or categories of tools to disable
environmentVariables.name: MDB_MCP_DISABLED_TOOLS

environmentVariables.description: When set to true, only allows read and metadata operation types
environmentVariables.name: MDB_MCP_READ_ONLY

environmentVariables.description: When set to disabled, disables telemetry collection
environmentVariables.name: MDB_MCP_TELEMETRY

title: MongoDB
